source.detail: shown with horizontal lines at 166 and 174 W/mK respectively. (p. 23). K. Esfarjani, G. Chen, H. T. Stokes, Heat transport in silicon from first-principles calculations, Phys. Rev. B 84, 085204 (2011), doi:10.1103/PhysRevB.84.085204, arXiv:1107.5288. kappa computed within the relaxation-time approximation (RTA); the paper's Eq. 17 and text state the conductivity is calculated within RTA, the iterative/full Boltzmann solution being attributed to Broido et al.
